assertions.title: Disconnect button hidden when no wallet connected

steps.expected: Page loads with Connect Wallet button visible
steps.observed: Page loaded, Connect Wallet button visible

steps.action: Check DOM for Disconnect button visibility
steps.observed: Disconnect button exists in DOM but is hidden (display:none). 0 visible disconnect buttons found.

steps.action: Inject mock wallet and click Connect Wallet
steps.expected: Wallet connects and Disconnect button appears
steps.observed: Mock Wallet connected. Disconnect button now visible alongside wallet name (Mock Wallet) and truncated address (0x1234...7890).

evidence.domInspection: Disconnect button found in DOM with visible=false on initial load; visible=true after wallet connect

assertions.title: Token input shows symbol and truncated address

steps.action: Observe default token inputs on page load (Base chain)
steps.expected: Token inputs show symbol + truncated address
steps.observed: From Token shows 'USDC (0x833589fC...2913)', To Token shows 'WETH (0x42000000...0006)'

steps.action: Clear From Token input and type 'DAI' to trigger autocomplete
steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown appears with DAI token
steps.observed: Dropdown appeared with DAI (Dai Stablecoin) and full address

steps.action: Check data-address attribute for full address
steps.observed: data-address='0x50c5725949A6F0c72E6C4a641F24049A917DB0Cb' - full address preserved for quote requests

steps.action: Observe layout of Connect Wallet button relative to trading form
steps.expected: Connect Wallet is near/part of the trading flow
steps.observed: Connect Wallet button is positioned directly below the heading and above the trading form. Heading bottom=56px, wallet section top=86px, form top=182px. The wallet area is visually part of the main content flow.

steps.action: Verify button is not isolated in a corner
steps.expected: Button is centered with the form, not in a distant corner
steps.observed: Button is left-aligned at x=234, matching the form content area. Same horizontal alignment as form fields.

evidence.layoutMeasurement: Wallet button at y=86, form starts at y=182. Gap of ~56px. Both in same content column.

steps.action: Submit a Compare Quotes request (USDC->WETH on Base)
steps.expected: Quote results appear with primary info visible
steps.observed: Results show: tokens, amount out (0.512... WETH), gas (0.0075 gwei), recommended label, approve/swap buttons. A 'Details [+]' button is collapsed below.

steps.expected: Detailed data (router address, calldata, approval details) appears
steps.observed: Expanded section shows: From/To addresses, Input Amount, Router Address, Router Calldata (truncated), Approval Token, Approval Spender, Gas Used, Slippage. Button changes to 'Details [-]'.

steps.action: Verify primary view is clean without expansion
steps.expected: Primary view shows only tokens, amounts, gas, swap action
steps.observed: Confirmed: primary view shows RECOMMENDED label, amount out, via provider, approve/swap buttons. All technical details hidden behind Details [+] toggle.

evidence.domInspection: Details section toggled via [+]/[-] button; primary view clean with tokens, amounts, gas, and action buttons

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-POLISH-001 (disconnect hidden without wallet), VAL-POLISH-003 (token symbol + truncated address), VAL-POLISH-007 (wallet connect near form), VAL-POLISH-008 (details collapsed below primary view).
